docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NAZLUKHANYAN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT TEGSCO LLC D.B.A. SAN FRANCISCO AUTO RETURN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-05-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TEGSCO LLC D.B.A. SAN FRANCISCO AUTO RETURN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TEGSCO LLC D.B.A. SAN FRANCISCO AUTO RETURN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO NOV-15-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS AT TODAYS HEARING. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY EUGENIA BYCHKOVA--QA ADMIN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TEGSCO LLC D.B.A. SAN FRANCISCO AUTO RETURN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-15-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN--VP TOWING & QA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAZLUKHANYAN, MICHAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TEGSCO LLC D.B.A. SAN FRANCISCO AUTO RETURN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
